body.body: Map the template extraction process into the matrix as habits. Steps: (1) PROC_PATTERN_RECOGNIZE — given Python code or habit chain, identify which template pattern it matches. (2) PROC_TEMPLATE_PARAMETERIZE — extract the parameters from a concrete instance. (3) PROC_TEMPLATE_INSTANTIATE — given template id + params, seed the resulting habits. This closes the loop: Igor can look at new Python code, recognize the pattern, and seed habits without CC. Prereq: T-template-seed-patterns. This is the meta-level that makes the whole system self-extending.
body.title: Seed pattern-extraction habits — Igor recognizes and seeds templates himself
body.result: recognize_pattern() + parameterize_template() tools added to template_tools.py (OpenRouter cheap model, forensic logging). Three delegation habits seeded: PROC_PATTERN_RECOGNIZE (trigger: 'recognize pattern'), PROC_TEMPLATE_PARAMETERIZE (trigger: 'parameterize template'), PROC_TEMPLATE_INSTANTIATE (trigger: 'instantiate template'). 21 tests; 182 pass total. Pushed a0ea45c.
